name: Yorki
description:
"Calico" Yorki a blond haired pirate with two tattoos on his face, one under his right eye and one under his lower lip. His tattoos resembled the katakana character, **ヨ**. He was the captain of the Rumbar Pirates who brought Laboon to Reverse Mountain fifty years ago from West Blue.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
